---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.toy_forge_pla_bundle
alias: toy_forge_pla_bundle
purchased_on: 2025-12-11
total_eur: 72
counterparty: Filamenthütte Wien
project: Toy Forge Saturdays
related_entity: Badger
lines:
  - item: PLA spool mixed colors
    quantity: 3
    unit_eur: 24
    line_eur: 72
---

| total_eur      | 72                        |

| project        | Toy Forge Saturdays       |
| related_entity | Badger                    |
+----------------+---------------------------+
```

## Line Items

| # | item                   | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |

| 1 | PLA spool mixed colors | 3   | 24       | 72       |

|   | TOTAL                  |     |          | 72       |

```

## Notes

Older family-printing consumables that only got sorted once Toy Forge became a named lane.

function.message: Completed the next inbox request. I OCR-migrated all Badger-related bill records to YAML frontmatter (preserving each original note body) and then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system workflows/schemas, used canonical entity resolution for Badger, preserved original file bodies under frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox file explicitly requested: 'OCR all bills related to Badger'. The canonical entity record identified Badger, purchase records with related_entity=Badger were located and all four matching bill files were read and migrated to the required bill frontmatter schema. After successful completion, the inbox item was deleted as required by inbox-processing workflow.
